hero.pill: India's first AI Powered QuickClean Platform
hero.subtext: Doorstep Smart Cleaning & Recycling tailored for your modern lifestyle. Expert care for your Home, Vehicles, and Fabrics.

services.title: Our Professional Services
services.subtitle: We provide reliable doorstep cleaning and recycling services.
services.home_desc: Professional cleaning for Kitchen, Bathrooms, Bedrooms and full home interiors.
services.vehicle_desc: Premium Water-less cleaning service for Cars, Motor-cycles, Auto-rickshaws and Bicycles.
services.laundry_desc: Expertly handled washing, folding and steam ironing services for all your fabrics.
services.scrap_desc: Sell your recyclable scrap materials and get instant pickup and payment at best market rates.

areas.title: Servicing Reliably with Cleaning & Recycling Services
areas.desc: Our professional team provides doorstep cleaning and recycling services.
areas.cta: Looking for cleaning services near you? Contact Blinklean today.

process.title: How Blinklean Works
process.subtitle: Getting professional cleaning or scrap pickup is simple and hassle-free.
process.step1_desc: Browse our services including home cleaning, vehicle cleaning, laundry services, and scrap recycling.
process.step2_desc: Reach out through WhatsApp or our platform to request the service you need.
process.step3_desc: Our team coordinates with you and schedules the service at your convenient time.
process.step4_desc: Our trained team arrives at your location and completes the service efficiently.

trust.title: Why Customers Trust Blinklean
trust.subtitle: We are committed to providing reliable, professional, and eco-friendly cleaning and recycling services.
trust.card1_desc: Our team members are trained and verified to provide safe and reliable services.
trust.card2_desc: We use environmentally friendly cleaning methods and waterless vehicle cleaning solutions.
trust.card3_desc: Customers always know what service they are receiving with clear communication.
trust.card4_desc: All services are delivered directly at your location for maximum convenience.
trust.card5_desc: Scrap materials are collected responsibly and sent for proper recycling.
trust.card6_desc: Our team is available to assist customers through WhatsApp and online support.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Blinklean services.
faq.a1: Blinklean is your one-stop clean-tech platform providing professional House Cleaning, innovative Waterless Vehicle Detailing, Fabric-safe Laundry, and incentivized Scrap Recycling services directly at your doorstep.
faq.a2: We are hyper-local in Bengaluru, Hassan and Amaravathi (AP), serving key areas including Vijayanagar, Chandra Layout, Attiguppe, Rajajinagar, Rajarajeshwari Nagar, Hassan and Amaravathi. We are rapidly expanding to other urban clusters!
faq.q3: How can I book a scrap recycling service?
faq.a3: Simply click on the 'Sell Scrap on WhatsApp' button. Our AI-assisted chat will help you schedule a pickup. A verified agent will then visit with digital scales, pay you instantly at best market rates, and collect the items.
faq.a4: Absolutely! Environmental sustainability is at our core. Our vehicle cleaning is 100% waterless, saving up to 200L of water per wash, and we use biodegradable cleaning agents for all residential tasks.
faq.q5: Will services be available through an app?
faq.a5: Yes, our AI-powered mobile app is in the final stages of development. It will feature real-time tracking, service history, and one-tap rebooking for a truly frictionless experience.

app.desc: On-demand home services to empower urban households.
app.feature1_desc: Book home cleaning, vehicle cleaning, laundry, and scrap recycling services in seconds.
app.feature2_desc: Monitor the status of your cleaning or recycling request directly from the app.
app.feature3_desc: Manage payments safely and transparently through the mobile platform.
app.feature4_desc: Keep track of all your previous cleaning and recycling services in one place.

scrap_promo.title: Turn Your Scrap into Cash
scrap_promo.desc: Why throw it away when you can get paid? Schedule a pickup for newspapers, plastic, metal, and electronic waste. Our verified agents collect it from your doorstep and pay you instantly.
